display.purpose: Screen titles on login, settings, major headers.

body.purpose: Message text, list previews, form content.

shadows.name: shadow-subtle
shadows.purpose: Offset layer under raised bubbles and cards.

shadows.name: shadow-azure-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary button underlay glow on dark canvas.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA: sign in, send, confirm. Azure gradient pill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #3B82F6, #2563EB); color: #FFFFFF; padding: 12px 24px; min-height: 52px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; border: none; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2563EB; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px) scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3B82F6; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Dialog cancel, ghost actions on raised surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #2A3142; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 12px 24px; min-height: 48px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #2E3748; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #313A4D; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3B82F6; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #E05252, #C44040); color: #FFFFFF; padding: 12px 24px; min-height: 52px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; border: none; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s; } .ds-btn-danger:active { transform: translateY(1px) scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E05252; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Sent Message Bubble
components.description: Outgoing chat message with asymmetric tail corner.
components.css: .ds-bubble-sent { background: #1E2A3D; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 12px 14px 22px; max-width: 270px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; border: 1px solid #2E3748; border-radius: 24px 24px 4px 24px; box-shadow: 1px 2px 0 #0D000000; }

components.name: Received Message Bubble
components.description: Incoming chat message, one step lighter than sent.
components.css: .ds-bubble-received { background: #2A3142; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 12px 14px 22px; max-width: 270px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; border: 1px solid #2E3748; border-radius: 24px 24px 24px 4px; box-shadow: 1px 2px 0 #0D000000; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Pill search bar on home and friend lists.
components.css: .ds-input-search { background: #1C2230; color: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #2E3748; border-radius: 999px; min-height: 48px; padding: 0 16px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input-search::placeholder { color: #6B7589; } .ds-input-search:focus { outline: none; border-color: #3B82F6; }

components.name: Active Filter Pill
components.css: .ds-pill-active { display: inline-block; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #3B82F6, #2563EB); color: #FFFFFF; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 999px; }

components.name: Dialog Card
components.description: Alert dialog container on sunken surface.
components.html:
Confirm action

This cannot be undone.
components.css: .ds-dialog { background: #1C2230; border: 1px solid #2E3748; border-radius: 24px; padding: 24px; max-width: 320px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-dialog-title { color: #FFFFFF; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-dialog-body { color: #8B95A8; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: A dark-premium Android communication surface built for low-light, frequent use. Deep slate canvas, layered surfaces, white type with disciplined hierarchy, and one azure accent. Rejects Facebook brightness, AI-slop gradients, and flat gray chat clones.
keyCharacteristics: Cool slate neutral family with clear surface steps
Single azure accent for CTAs and active states
Tonal elevation via offset layers and borders
44dp touch targets, WCAG AA on dark

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Azure appears on ≤10% of any screen surface area. Status colors are never decorative accents.

rules.name: The Weight-Not-Size Rule
rules.body: Secondary hierarchy uses Ink Muted and Medium weight before shrinking below 14sp.

rules.name: The Flat-Canvas Rule
rules.body: App background stays Canvas Deep. Elevated elements rise through surface tokens only.

dos: Do use Canvas Deep (#151A24) as universal background. Never pure #000000.
Do keep one azure accent for primary actions, active tabs, focus rings.
Do separate sent (#1E2A3D) and received (#2A3142) bubbles by surface step.
Do use Ink Muted (#8B95A8) for timestamps and metadata.
Do maintain 44dp minimum touch targets on primary controls.
Do tint shadows toward canvas hue, never pure black at high opacity.
donts: Don't use Facebook/Messenger bright blue chrome or cluttered feed density.
Don't use AI slop: purple neon gradients, decorative glassmorphism, gradient text, side-stripe borders, identical card grids.
Don't flatten all text to #FFFFFF without Ink Muted hierarchy.
Don't add a second accent color.
Don't use glass blur as default decoration.
Don't gate content visibility on entrance animations.
Don't use all-caps for headlines or buttons.
